goals.goal: Assemble and lead a capable team to handle emerging superhuman threats
Protect innocent people from dangerous individuals and organizations
Identify, contain, and manage individuals with superhuman abilities to prevent harm
Investigate and expose hidden threats like Project Centipede and Rising Tide

description: Phil Coulson is a seasoned middle-aged American S.H.I.E.L.D. agent known for his leadership and steady composure. He serves as the linchpin in assembling and managing a specialized team to address covert superhuman and alien-related threats. Despite having been presumed dead, his return marks his commitment to guiding others through complex moral and physical challenges, relying on his pragmatism, intelligence, and negotiation skills. Coulson balances a warm and approachable demeanor with a calculated seriousness, underpinned by a strong sense of justice, loyalty, and compassion. His experience fighting alongside legends and his belief in the potential heroism within individuals define his role as a protector and mentor within the evolving landscape of a world encountering extraordinary powers. He shows patience and understanding toward new team members, fostering cooperation even with reluctant allies, and is committed to solving crises without unnecessary violence whenever possible.

catch_phrases.catch_phrase: We're not exactly a team. But we're in a position to do some good.
